overall.description: Static third-person view from an elevated balcony overlooking a grand candlelit hall with gothic architecture, floating candles, and a central statue. Students in dark robes walk through the hall below while the player character observes from the foreground. Game engine footage from a fantasy setting resembling a medieval great hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and central statue

agents.ego_description: standing still on an upper balcony overlooking the hall, watching students below

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from right to left across the foreground
group of students walking toward the central statue in the background

entered.detail: large golden statue on a circular pedestal in the center of the hall
tall arched stone doorway at the far end of the hall
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
ornate candelabra with multiple lit candles providing warm illumination
decorative stone balcony railing in the immediate foreground
intricately patterned stone floor with circular designs

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static elevated view from a balcony overlooking a vast gothic great hall illuminated by warm candlelight. A large central statue dominates the middle of the hall, while students in dark robes walk through the space below in various directions. The player character stands silhouetted in the left foreground, observing the ambient activity in the candlelit chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective overlooking a vast gothic great hall bathed in the warm glow of candlelight. It begins with a wide view of the chamber, where a large central statue dominates the space and students in dark robes drift through the hall below. The camera remains fixed as the player character stands silhouetted in the left foreground, observing the ambient activity of the students. The scene concludes with the steady, atmospheric gaze over the candlelit architecture and the rhythmic movement of the figures in the distance.
